title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Unilever - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Unilever - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Unilever has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hindustan Unilever:
Hindustan Unilever is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
